summary: He explicitly states that the crypto market bottom is in and expects BTC to move higher.
narrative: Taiki has pivoted from his previously bearish short positions to calling a market bottom, arguing that structural factors like STRC will propel Bitcoin to higher prices. He challenges the 4-Year Cycle theorists and suggests the corrective phase has concluded, signaling a shift toward capital gains rather than preservation.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
